title: Introducing Agent Toolkit for AWS
summary: Agent Toolkit for AWS enables AI coding agents to work with AWS services by providing up-to-date documentation, best practices, and tested procedures. The toolkit includes agent skills as markdown runbooks, plugins with MCP configuration, and built-in guardrails to improve success rates and auditability through CloudTrail.
